title: EcoWise Strong Disposable Bagasse Bowls - Pack of 50, 12 Oz, Sugarcane Fibre, Eco-Friendly, Biodegradable, Hot & Cold Foods, Large Bowls for Soup, Salad, Dessert, Birthday Party
features: ✅🍚STRONG BOWLS PACK OF 50: Each pack includes 50 convenient 12oz / 350ml Bowls, providing ample supply for various dishes. ✅Whether you're hosting a small gathering or enjoying a meal with Family, these Bowls offer the Perfect portion size for Soups, Salads, Desserts, Snacks, Cakes, and more.

✅STRONG, STURDY & DURABLE: Crafted from Bagasse material, these Bowls are lightweight yet Sturdy and can withstand the rigours of Everyday use, ensuring they hold up well during meals and gatherings without easily bending or breaking.

✅🍃ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from sugarcane fibre, these Bowls offer a sustainable alternative to traditional disposable tableware. ✅Reduce your environmental footprint with guilt-free dining, knowing you're using a biodegradable and compostable option.

✅🍜MICROWAVE & FREEZER SAFE: These Bowls are safe to use in both the Microwave and Freezer, making them versatile and convenient. ✅Easily reheat leftovers or store meals for later enjoyment without worrying about harmful chemicals leaching into your food. ✅GREAT FOR HOT AND COLD FOODS, BBQ'S

✅⭐PERFECT FOR OCCASIONS: Whether it's a casual Picnic, a backyard BBQ, or a formal Dinner Party, these bagasse Bowls are the ideal choice for any Occasion. ✅Their Sleek and white design complements any table setting, adding a touch of Elegance to your gatherings.✅
